svg.title: C Language Standards Timeline
svg.desc: A timeline of C standards from K&R to C23, highlighting C99 as the recommended sweet spot for restrictive, robust, and modern-compatible code.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about K&R C and its limitations')
sendPrompt('What are the key features of C99 that make it ideal?')
g.text: stdint.h, bool, restrict, VLAs, inline, // comments
Universally supported; widely used in embedded & POSIX

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does C11 add over C99?')

g.text: Bug fixes, nullptr, typeof, bit utilities
